content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

WITH counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM J09D_temp
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN c.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM counts c
WHERE J09D_temp.HAUS = c.HAUS;

CREATE TABLE J09D_stage1 AS
SELECT
  jt.*, 
  eab."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  eab."Installation" AS ANLAGE_EABLG,
  eab."Meter Reading reason",
  eab."MR Reason - Text",
  eab."Scheduled MR Date",
  eab."Meter Reading unit",
  eab."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1"
FROM J09D_temp jt
LEFT JOIN eablg eab
  ON jt.ANLAGE = eab."Installation";

CREATE TABLE J09D_stage2 AS
SELECT
  s1.*,
  n.TITLE AS NET_TITLE,
  n.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
  n.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
  n.STREET AS NET_STREET,
  n.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
  n.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
  n.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
  n.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
  n.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL,
  sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
  sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
  sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
  sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
  sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
  sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
  sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
  sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
  sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL
FROM J09D_stage1 s1
LEFT JOIN net_master n
  ON s1.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm
  ON s1.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

CREATE TABLE J09D_final AS
SELECT
  s2."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  s2.HAUS,
  s2.ANLAGE,
  s2.ME_MA_ID,
  s2.EQUNR,
  s2.HOUSE_NUM1,
  s2.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_TITLE ELSE s2.NET_TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_FORENAME ELSE s2.NET_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_SURNAME ELSE s2.NET_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_STREET ELSE s2.NET_STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_STREETNO ELSE s2.NET_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE s2.NET_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_CITY1 ELSE s2.NET_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_CITY2 ELSE s2.NET_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN s2.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN s2.SALES_EMAIL ELSE s2.NET_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_stage2 s2;

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_final;

args.email:
Please find attached the J09D export for EVU team.

Best regards,
Meter Reading Automation System

kwargs.content:
Process J09D has been executed end-to-end:

1. Created temporary table `J09D_temp` from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09D`.
2. Added empty column `ENTSCHEIDUNG`.
3. Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` per HAUS:
   - `KSA` if that HAUS has fewer than 3 distinct `EQUNR`
   - `EVU` otherwise
4. Joined with `eablg` on `ANLAGE` (Installation).
5. Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`.
6. Applied comparison rule:
   - If sales data exists for an EQUNR, used sales data and ignored net data.
   - Otherwise, used net data.
7. Exported final data to CSV `J09D.csv` with columns:  
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.  
   Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_4506/J09D.csv`
8. Emailed the CSV to `meter.readings@evu.com` for the EVU team.
9. Dropped the temporary table `J09D_temp`.

If you want, I can also drop the intermediate tables (`J09D_stage1`, `J09D_stage2`, `J09D_final`) or leave them for inspection.
